rds.security.group.DBSecurityGroupIngres.Description: Ingress rules to be applied to the DB security group.

rds.security.group.EC2VpcId.Description: The identifier of an Amazon VPC. This property indicates the VPC that this DB security group belongs to.  The `EC2VpcId` property is for backward compatibility with older regions, and is no longer recommended for providing security information to an RDS DB instance.

rds.security.group.GroupDescription.Description: Provides the description of the DB security group.

rds.security.group.Tags.Description: Tags to assign to the DB security group.
